text.message: hey lemoncurd! we just played. You were orange last game (I was black)

ill get back to yo on rc
black just go out, meet people, eat good food, goto the parks

pray the g train is not down
I think I'm going to be off the Q. I'm nearish to prospect park
i think you win this game easy black
ya... my pips are kinda op
